title: Dynamic filter composing and/or
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.flexible_search/1` that takes a map with optional `:team_id` (include) and `:exclude_ids` (exclude). The result should be users where `(team_id matches) AND (id not in exclude_ids)`. Use two dynamic fragments, one for each filter, composed with `and` inside a single `where: ^dyn`. Both filters are optional; start with `dynamic(true)`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Composing two optional dynamics with `and`. Requires knowing that `^acc and ...` is the composition pattern inside a dynamic body.
